title: Bold Signal Frame
summary: Bold colored card on a dark gradient — big section number, nav breadcrumb, orange card sliding in, title rising.

origin.name: none (original preset by the L2 skill author)
origin.reference: No specific real-world studio; the 'Bold Signal' look is an original preset composed by the frontend-slides author

provenance.transformation: Static slide preset → animated hyperframes timeline (section number rolls in, nav breadcrumb fades, #FF5722 focal card slides in from the right, title rises) built as original CSS keyframes. Original sample data. No upstream source code copied verbatim.
